name: redis
why: Popular infrastructure primitive. Good fit for cache, memory, queue, and vector workflows.
evaluationNotes: Best as optional credential-scoped or env-scoped shared runtime.

name: slack
why: Very common collaboration surface for agents and team workflows.
evaluationNotes: Need clear read/write boundary and token profile model.

name: sqlite
why: Simple local database path. Good proving ground for project-local database tooling.
evaluationNotes: Need path allowlist and file-level safety checks.

name: postgres
why: Very common production database target for read-only or analyst workflows.
evaluationNotes: Prefer read-only mode first. Need explicit connection-profile handling.

name: google-drive-sheets
why: Common knowledge and document surface for end-user automation.
evaluationNotes: Need strict OAuth profile model and doc-scoping rules.

name: time
why: Safe baseline utility server from official reference set; useful for deterministic timezone/date tasks.
evaluationNotes: No secrets; best first candidate for isolated batch profile.

name: pdf
why: Popular local-doc workflow with low risk when constrained to project paths.
evaluationNotes: No secrets; validate file path controls and performance on large PDFs.

name: brave-search
why: Widely used search integration with strong maintenance cadence.
evaluationNotes: Requires BRAVE_API_KEY; keep disabled in safe profile and verify gating behavior in labs profile.

name: everything
why: Canonical protocol surface test server from MCP maintainers; useful for compatibility smoke checks.
evaluationNotes: Use in dev/labs profile only; not intended for production workloads.
